title: GreyPack
description: in the texture pack there are the enderpearl the golden apple and the emerald that are in a grey colourways
body: In this texture pack ,Enderpearls,Emeralds and Golden Appels are in a grey colourways and the GUI is in a dark Grey mode. The texture Pack made by LegoLars19 a german Twitch Streamer and Youtuber.Thx for the download
